hooks.command: sh -c 'd="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; db="$d/.strata/graph.duckdb"; [ -f "$db" ] || exit 0; input=$(cat); if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then f=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; blast=$(strata blast "$f" --db "$db" --format agent 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; [ -n "$blast" ] || exit 0; jq -n --arg c "$blast" "{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:\"PreToolUse\",additionalContext:\$c}}"; exit 0; else printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"Strata pre-edit: run impact/context (or strata blast <file>) on the symbols in this file BEFORE editing, and report the blast radius. Treat confidence < 0.40 or ambiguous as UNKNOWN. PAUSE if risk is HIGH/CRITICAL or crosses a repo boundary. (install jq for the auto-computed blast radius.)\"}}"; exit 0; fi' # strata-hook
sh -c 'd="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; [ -f "$d/.strata/graph.duckdb" ] && exit 0; echo "Strata: no index yet, run \`strata index .\` to enable cross-plane impact analysis."' # strata-hook
